title: CVS to restore coverage of Zepbound, add Eli Lilly's obesity pill to drug plans
summary_full: CVS will add Zepbound coverage on Oct. 1, and start covering Lilly's newly approved Foundayo pill on June 1.
summary_public: CVS will add Zepbound coverage on Oct. 1, and start covering Lilly's newly approved Foundayo pill on June 1.
